ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANH, HAI, IND AND AS HUSBAND OF XIEN LY TRAN TRAN, XIEN LY, AS WIFE OF HAI BANH HUYNH, LAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUNNELL, BARNEY EUGENE $9,303.74 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,303.74, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: DEFT BUNNELL TO PAY $8803.74 TO PLTF BANH AND $500 TO PLTF TRAN. CLAIMS AGAINST DEFT/X-DEFT BROWN ARE DENIED. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANH, HAI, IND AND AS HUSBAND OF XIEN LY TRAN
